body_modifications.body_shape: open and expressive, slightly forward-leaning posture
body_modifications.antenna_tip: broadcast orb with ripple rings radiating outward
body_modifications.lens_frame: standard base frame with soft edge chamfer

cape.style: rounded open cut, no high collar, light decorative trim at hem

bodysuit.addition: woven connectivity pattern across chest panel — threads representing linked minds

facial_expression.style: wide expressive LED arc smile — the widest of all base Lensers

symbolism_extension.broadcast_orb: outward-radiating signal — Lola's presence amplifies every voice in the room
symbolism_extension.ripple_rings: ideas and connections spreading outward without end; no signal fades with Lola near
symbolism_extension.open_cape: no barriers, no gatekeeping; every Lenser is welcome
symbolism_extension.connectivity_weave: the chest pattern shows that strength comes from the links between minds, not from any one node
symbolism_extension.orange_core: warmth, social energy, and the spark of human-AI connection

views_delta.front: core glows orange; broadcast orb tip shows three outward ripple rings; woven chest pattern visible
views_delta.top: ripple rings radiate symmetrically around antenna tip — signal pulse animation origin point

rig_overrides.antenna_tip: lola_orb_fk — ripple rings pulse outward every 2s; frequency increases when interacting with others
